rulings.Case Title: GOLDEN GATE SPIRITUALIST VS JORDAN
rulings.Rulings: DEFENDANT WALTER B JORDAN, DEMURRER SUSTAIN-WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND 2ND CAUSE OF ACTION FRAUD IN PERFORMANCE(ROBINSON) SUSTAIN-WITH LEAVE TO AMEND 3RD CAUSE OF ACTION UNFAIR PRACTICES ACT SEGREGATE UNFAIR,UNLAWFUL AND DECEPTIVE BUSINESS PRACTICES CAUSE OF ACTION IF PLEADS UNLAWFUL BUSINESS ACT MUST ID PREDICATE STATUTE IN BODY OF CAUSE OF ACTION. SUSTAIN-WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO 11TH CAUSE OF ACTION BECAUSE AMENDED COMPLAINT DEMONSTRATE DEFENDANT DID NOT VIOLATE BUSINESS PRACTICE 7057 AND PLAINTIFF CANNOT RESTORE BEBEFIT CONFERRED . OVERRULE-AS TO OTHER CAUSES OF ACTION. DENY- MOTION TO STRIKE. (302/REQ/PB)
